name: harness-engineering
description: Installable Harness Engineering workflow pack with Chinese stage commands, reusable skills, templates, validators, and starter assets for auditable AI coding delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Auditable AI coding workflow with Chinese stage commands.
interface.longDescription: A reusable Harness Engineering workflow plugin for planning, reviewing, validating, and auditing AI-assisted software delivery. It includes a Codex skill, starter .harness assets, validators, templates, and the harness CLI facade.
defaultPrompt: 用 Harness 流程配置这个需求
